implement.detail: browser-default: /tabs/:id/observe (url/title/heading + DOM-shape counts + viewport + optional a11y/screenshot — the fingerprint inputs), /a11y (CDP Accessibility.getFullAXTree, page.accessibility was removed in modern Playwright), /execute (locator ladder: selector/role+name/testId/label/placeholder/text -> click/fill/select/check/hover/press); opt-in persistent profile (stable user-data-dir) + stealth (--disable-blink-features=AutomationControlled + navigator.webdriver mask); apm.yml config + summary

test.detail: browser-observe.test (2, REAL chromium): observe returns fingerprint inputs + a11y for a page; execute clicks via the locator ladder (verified by title change via observe). validate 4/4; syntax ok.

review.detail: fixed: CDP a11y (page.accessibility removed), readBody returns parsed object (not string), test isolation (shared server)

codexReview.detail: reviewed jointly with F2 (2 rounds); CORS/auth Origin guard (HTTP+WS), nav-scheme confinement, ephemeral cleanup, IPv6 loopback all fixed. See slices/F2.

codexPwTest.detail: Z1 drives a real browser step
